hero.tagline: Engineered for the Future. Priced for Today.

overview.minides: A sports electric sedan with 0.219 Cd drag, Cell-to-Body Blade Battery, 15.6-inch rotating screen, and a 3.8-second AWD Performance — all under ₹55 lakh.
overview.description: The BYD Seal launched in India on 5 March 2024, priced from ₹41 lakh to ₹53.15 lakh. It uses Cell-to-Body (CTB) technology integrating the Blade LFP battery into the chassis for improved rigidity and a 50:50 weight balance. Three variants are offered: Dynamic (61.44 kWh RWD, 510 km), Premium (82.56 kWh RWD, 650 km), and Performance (82.56 kWh AWD, 580 km, 3.8 sec 0–100). All variants share a 15.6-inch rotating ADAM touchscreen, DYNAUDIO 12-speaker audio, 9 airbags, full Level 2 ADAS, 360-degree camera, NFC card key, heat pump AC, dual wireless chargers, and a fixed panoramic glass roof with electric blind. The MY2025 update added wireless Android Auto/CarPlay across all variants, DiSus-C intelligent damping on the Performance variant, and Frequency Selective Dampers on the Premium.

suspension.additionalTech: Frequency Selective Dampers (FSD) on Premium; DiSus-C Intelligent Damping (IDS) on Performance
